Summary: As a Driver, I should be able to swtich all available cars for the MoveRequest so that i can use the car of my choice.
As a Driver, I want to change my driver info, so that I can change my driver range, etc.
As a Driver, I want to be able to cancel a MoveTrip, so that I can give Client a notice of cancellation
As a Driver, I want to view all available MoveRequests so that i can send a MoveOffer
As a Client, I should be able to make cancel my MoveRequest so that I can change my plans
As a Client, I should be able to manage my MoveRequests so that I can have a better control over my requests
As a User, I should be able to Manage my Account so that I can make changes to my account
As a User, I should be able to Logout of the system, so that i can secure my account after use.
As a User, I should be able to login into my account so that i can access my accont.
As a User, I should be able to make an account, so that I can use the App.
As a Client, I want to browse and accept driver offers on my MoveRequest so that I can perform MoveTrip.
Description:
* View a List of Move Offers from different movers 
* Accept Move Offer

Summary: As a Driver, I want to manage my vehicles so that I can change my vehicle info
Description:
* Swifters should be able to perform CRUD operations on Vehicles
** Edit
*** Vehicle License Plate
*** Vehicle Name
*** Model
*** Max load
*** Color
*** Type (EV, Gas)
** Remove vehicle 
** Add vehicle

Summary: As a Developer, I want dummy data in database so that I can test out my back end during development
Description: Create a Seeded data for each entity

Summary: As a developer I want a Database for the system so that I can start designing database compatible back end.
As a Developer, I want to have a clear understanding of all the entities and their relations so that I can create Database Schema
As a Client, I want to create a MoveRequest so that I can find drivers' offers.
Description:
* Select the date and time for the trip
* Select the start and end location for the trip 
* Set a max budget

Summary: As an Admin, I should be able to manage user accounts so that I can perform administrative actions.
Description:
* Should be able to perform CRUD operations for both Swifters and Movers
** Add New Users
** Edit Users
*** Passwords
*** Personal Info
*** Addresses
** Delete Accounts
** Ban Accounts
** View User Accounts
